# Prescripto AI

> AI-powered prescription analysis, universal medicine search, and doctor finder for patients.

Prescripto AI helps people understand handwritten prescriptions in plain English, look up any medicine (uses, dosage, side effects, interactions), and find verified doctors and clinics nearby.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, how it works, and FAQ.
- [Medicines](/medicines): Search any medicine for uses, dosage, side effects, interactions, and alternatives.
- [Doctors](/doctors): Find clinics and specialists by city and specialization.
